_rationale.purpose: Rejection parity proof for DART-MWm23vqgX9O6: `lci search --include PATTERN` is silently ignored by Go (server.go:506 forwards only ExcludePattern to the engine; IncludePattern is dropped at the server boundary even though cmd/lci/search.go threads it through SearchOptions). C++ mirrors that silent drop: emits a one-line stderr notice (suppressed under --json) and produces the same result set as a search without --include.
_rationale.iter10_pattern: Same pattern as iter-10 (DART-6lwWAw28lQfj) for grep-style flags: when Go forwards a flag into SearchOptions but the server/display path drops it, C++ must match by also not applying client-side post-filtering. This descriptor proves stdout equivalence so we never reintroduce a divergent client-side include filter.
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout must match Go byte-for-byte (the --include is a silent no-op on both binaries; result set is identical to a search without the flag).
